chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH BENCH AT SUKKUR Cr. Transfer App. No. S – 40 of 2024 Date of hearing Order with signature of Judge Hearing of case 1. For orders on office objections at Flag-A 2. For hearing of main case 21.05.2024 Mr. Rehmat Ali Shaikh, Advocate for applicant. Mr. Zulfiqar Ali Jatoi, Additional Prosecutor General..-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.- This application has been filed for transfer of a Criminal Case No. Nil of 2022 (Re: The State versus Syed Nadeem Shah and others), arising out of Crime No.78 of 2023 of Police Station Tando Masti Khan, District Khairpur, pending before learned Judicial Magistrate-IV, Khairpur on the ground that applicant has no confidence over him. Respondents, present, submit that complainant is in fact an accused in their murder case, and has lodged a false FIR against them to give pressure to them to come to terms with him. But in any case, he is not appearing in the trial Court to proceed with this case and give evidence. Be that as it may, no proof has been filed indicating any reason for reposing no confidence over the learned Presiding Officer of the Court by applicant. Learned Additional Prosecutor General has also opposed this application. Therefore, this application being meritless is accordingly dismissed. J U D G E Abdul Basit
